lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੈ ਕੰਤ ਨ ਭਾਵੈ ਚੋਲੜਾ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਕਿਉ ਧਨ ਸੇਜੈ ਜਾਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: merai kant na bhaavai cholarraa piaare kiau dhan sejai jaae |1|
lines.english: My Husband Lord is not pleased by these clothes, O Beloved; how can the soul-bride go to His bed? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੰਉ ਕੁਰਬਾਨੈ ਜਾਉ ਮਿਹਰਵਾਨਾ ਹੰਉ ਕੁਰਬਾਨੈ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hnau kurabaanai jaau miharavaanaa hnau kurabaanai jaau |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, O Dear Merciful Lord; I am a sacrifice to You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੈਨਿ ਜੋ ਤੇਰਾ ਨਾਉ ਤਿਨਾ ਕੈ ਹੰਉ ਸਦ ਕੁਰਬਾਨੈ ਜਾਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: lain jo teraa naau tinaa kai hnau sad kurabaanai jaau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Unto those who take to Your Name, I am forever a sacrifice. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੰਉ ਕੁਰਬਾਨੈ ਜਾਉ ਤਿਨਾ ਕੈ ਲੈਨਿ ਜੋ ਤੇਰਾ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hnau kurabaanai jaau tinaa kai lain jo teraa naau |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those who take to Your Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਙਣ ਵਾਲਾ ਜੇ ਰੰਙੈ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਐਸਾ ਰੰਗੁ ਨ ਡੀਠ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: rangan vaalaa je rangai saahib aisaa rang na ddeetth |2|
lines.english: and if the Dyer who dyes this cloth is the Lord Master - O, such a color has never been seen before! ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਰੰਙਣਿ ਜੇ ਥੀਐ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਪਾਈਐ ਨਾਉ ਮਜੀਠ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa rangan je theeai piaare paaeeai naau majeetth |
lines.english: If the body becomes the dyer's vat, O Beloved, and the Name is placed within it as the dye,

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੂੜਿ ਤਿਨਾ ਕੀ ਜੇ ਮਿਲੈ ਜੀ ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੀ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: dhoorr tinaa kee je milai jee kahu naanak kee aradaas |3|
lines.english: Bless me with the dust of those humble beings, O Dear Lord. Says Nanak, this is my prayer. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕੇ ਚੋਲੇ ਰਤੜੇ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਕੰਤੁ ਤਿਨਾ ਕੈ ਪਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: jin ke chole ratarre piaare kant tinaa kai paas |
lines.english: Those whose shawls are so dyed, O Beloved, their Husband Lord is always with them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸਾਜੇ ਆਪੇ ਰੰਗੇ ਆਪੇ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape saaje aape range aape nadar karee |
lines.english: He Himself creates, and He Himself imbues us. He Himself bestows His Glance of Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਾਮਣਿ ਕੰਤੈ ਭਾਵੈ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਰਾਵੇਇ ॥੪॥੧॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak kaaman kantai bhaavai aape hee raavee |4|1|3|
lines.english: O Nanak, if the soul-bride becomes pleasing to her Husband Lord, He Himself enjoys her. ||4||1||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਲੰਗ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: tilang mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Tilang, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਨੜੈ ਘਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗੋ ਕੀ ਨ ਮਾਣੇਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: aapanarrai ghar har rango kee na maanehi |
lines.english: Within the home of your own self, why do you not enjoy the Love of your Lord?

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਆਨੜੀਏ ਮਾਨੜਾ ਕਾਇ ਕਰੇਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: eaanarree maanarraa kaae karehi |
lines.english: O foolish and ignorant soul-bride, why are you so proud?

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਕੀਆ ਦੇਹਿ ਸਲਾਈਆ ਨੈਣੀ ਭਾਵ ਕਾ ਕਰਿ ਸੀਗਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: bhai keea dehi salaaeea nainee bhaav kaa kar seegaaro |
lines.english: Apply the Fear of God as the maascara to adorn your eyes, and make the Love of the Lord your ornament.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹੁ ਨੇੜੈ ਧਨ ਕੰਮਲੀਏ ਬਾਹਰੁ ਕਿਆ ਢੂਢੇਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sahu nerrai dhan kamalee baahar kiaa dtoodtehi |
lines.english: Your Husband Lord is so very near, O foolish bride; why do you search for Him outside?

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਆਣੀ ਬਾਲੀ ਕਿਆ ਕਰੇ ਜਾ ਧਨ ਕੰਤ ਨ ਭਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: eaanee baalee kiaa kare jaa dhan kant na bhaavai |
lines.english: What can the silly young bride do, if she is not pleasing to her Husband Lord?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਸੋਹਾਗਣਿ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਲਾਗੀ ਜਾ ਸਹੁ ਧਰੇ ਪਿਆਰੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: taa sohaagan jaaneeai laagee jaa sahu dhare piaaro |1|
lines.english: Then, you shall be known as a devoted and committed soul-bride, when you enshrine love for your Husband Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਕਰਮਾ ਕਿਛੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਨਾਹੀ ਜੇ ਬਹੁਤੇਰਾ ਧਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: vin karamaa kichh paaeeai naahee je bahuteraa dhaavai |
lines.english: Without the karma of good deeds, nothing is obtained, although she may run around frantically.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਣ ਪਲਾਹ ਕਰੇ ਬਹੁਤੇਰੇ ਸਾ ਧਨ ਮਹਲੁ ਨ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: karan palaah kare bahutere saa dhan mehal na paavai |
lines.english: She may plead and implore so many times, but still, such a bride shall not obtain the Mansion of the Lord's Presence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਬ ਲੋਭ ਅਹੰਕਾਰ ਕੀ ਮਾਤੀ ਮਾਇਆ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: lab lobh ahankaar kee maatee maaeaa maeh samaanee |
lines.english: She is intoxicated with greed, pride and egotism, and engrossed in Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਨੀ ਬਾਤੀ ਸਹੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਨਾਹੀ ਭਈ ਕਾਮਣਿ ਇਆਣੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: einee baatee sahu paaeeai naahee bhee kaaman eaanee |2|
lines.english: She cannot obtain her Husband Lord in these ways; the young bride is so foolish! ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਇ ਪੁਛਹੁ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਵਾਹੈ ਕਿਨੀ ਬਾਤੀ ਸਹੁ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: jaae puchhahu sohaaganee vaahai kinee baatee sahu paaeeai |
lines.english: Go and ask the happy, pure soul-brides, how did they obtain their Husband Lord?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰੇ ਸੋ ਭਲਾ ਕਰਿ ਮਾਨੀਐ ਹਿਕਮਤਿ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਚੁਕਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh kare so bhalaa kar maaneeai hikamat hukam chukaaeeai |
lines.english: Whatever the Lord does, accept that as good; do away with your own cleverness and self-will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹੁ ਕਹੈ ਸੋ ਕੀਜੈ ਤਨੁ ਮਨੋ ਦੀਜੈ ਐਸਾ ਪਰਮਲੁ ਲਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: sahu kahai so keejai tan mano deejai aisaa paramal laaeeai |
lines.english: As your Husband Lord directs, so you must act; surrender your body and mind to Him, and apply this perfume to yourself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਪ੍ਰੇਮਿ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਤਉ ਚਰਣੀ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai prem padaarath paaeeai tau charanee chit laaeeai |
lines.english: By His Love, true wealth is obtained; link your consciousness to His lotus feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਈਐ ਤਾ ਸਹੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਅਉਰੁ ਕੈਸੀ ਚਤੁਰਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: aap gavaaeeai taa sahu paaeeai aaur kaisee chaturaaee |
lines.english: Give up your selfhood, and so obtain your Husband Lord; what other clever tricks are of any use?

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਵ ਕਹਹਿ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਭੈਣੇ ਇਨੀ ਬਾਤੀ ਸਹੁ ਪਾਈਐ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ev kaheh sohaaganee bhaine inee baatee sahu paaeeai |3|
lines.english: So speaks the happy soul-bride, O sister; in this way, the Husband Lord is obtained. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣੇ ਕੰਤ ਪਿਆਰੀ ਸਾ ਸੋਹਾਗਣਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾ ਸਭਰਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: aapane kant piaaree saa sohaagan naanak saa sabharaaee |
lines.english: She who is loved by her Husband Lord, is the true soul-bride; O Nanak, she is the queen of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹੁ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਦੇਖੈ ਸੋ ਦਿਨੁ ਲੇਖੈ ਕਾਮਣਿ ਨਉ ਨਿਧਿ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: sahu nadar kar dekhai so din lekhai kaaman nau nidh paaee |
lines.english: When the Husband Lord looks upon the soul-bride with His Gracious Glance, that day is historic - the bride obtains the nine treasures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁੰਦਰਿ ਸਾਇ ਸਰੂਪ ਬਿਚਖਣਿ ਕਹੀਐ ਸਾ ਸਿਆਣੀ ॥੪॥੨॥੪॥
lines.translit: sundar saae saroop bichakhan kaheeai saa siaanee |4|2|4|
lines.english: She is beautiful, glorious and brilliant; she is known as truly wise. ||4||2||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੀ ਸਹਜ ਕੀ ਮਾਤੀ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਭਾਇ ਸਮਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: aisai rang raatee sehaj kee maatee ahinis bhaae samaanee |
lines.english: Thus she is imbued with His Love, intoxicated with delight; day and night, she is absorbed in His Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਲੰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: tilang mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Tilang, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਸੀ ਮੈ ਆਵੈ ਖਸਮ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਤੈਸੜਾ ਕਰੀ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਵੇ ਲਾਲੋ ॥
lines.translit: jaisee mai aavai khasam kee baanee taisarraa karee giaan ve laalo |
lines.english: As the Word of the Forgiving Lord comes to me, so do I express it, O Lalo.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਪ ਕੀ ਜੰਞ ਲੈ ਕਾਬਲਹੁ ਧਾਇਆ ਜੋਰੀ ਮੰਗੈ ਦਾਨੁ ਵੇ ਲਾਲੋ ॥
lines.translit: paap kee jany lai kaabalahu dhaaeaa joree mangai daan ve laalo |
lines.english: Bringing the marriage party of sin, Babar has invaded from Kaabul, demanding our land as his wedding gift, O Lalo.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਮੁ ਧਰਮੁ ਦੁਇ ਛਪਿ ਖਲੋਏ ਕੂੜੁ ਫਿਰੈ ਪਰਧਾਨੁ ਵੇ ਲਾਲੋ ॥
lines.translit: saram dharam due chhap khaloe koorr firai paradhaan ve laalo |
lines.english: Modesty and righteousness both have vanished, and falsehood struts around like a leader, O Lalo.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਜੀਆ ਬਾਮਣਾ ਕੀ ਗਲ ਥਕੀ ਅਗਦੁ ਪੜੈ ਸੈਤਾਨੁ ਵੇ ਲਾਲੋ ॥
lines.translit: kaajeea baamanaa kee gal thakee agad parrai saitaan ve laalo |
lines.english: The Qazis and the Brahmins have lost their roles, and Satan now conducts the marriage rites, O Lalo.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਤਿ ਸਨਾਤੀ ਹੋਰਿ ਹਿਦਵਾਣੀਆ ਏਹਿ ਭੀ ਲੇਖੈ ਲਾਇ ਵੇ ਲਾਲੋ ॥
lines.translit: jaat sanaatee hor hidavaaneea ehi bhee lekhai laae ve laalo |
lines.english: The Hindu women of high social status, and others of lowly status as well, are put into the same category, O Lalo.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਸਲਮਾਨੀਆ ਪੜਹਿ ਕਤੇਬਾ ਕਸਟ ਮਹਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਖੁਦਾਇ ਵੇ ਲਾਲੋ ॥
lines.translit: musalamaaneea parreh katebaa kasatt meh kareh khudaae ve laalo |
lines.english: The Muslim women read the Koran, and in their misery, they call upon God, O Lalo.
